heading: Hiring special means of transportation
label: 581 Hiring special means of transportation
text: In their execution and inspection of river and harbor improvement work, at points beyond easy reach of ordinary regular transportation lines, Engineer officers are authorized to hire and use such transportation as they may consider desirable and advantageous to the progress of work.
notes: CodificationSection is from act , popularly known as the “Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1912”.July 25, 1912
